name: powerbi-modeling-mcp
description: The Power BI Modeling MCP Server, brings Power BI semantic modeling capabilities to your agents.

configuration.title: Power BI Modeling MCP Server Extension configuration

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the MCP server (e.g., '--start --skipconfirmation --readonly')

environmentVariables.description: Environment variables as comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g., 'KEY1=value1,KEY2=value2')

scripts.package:win32-x64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-x64
scripts.package:win32-arm64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-arm64
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target darwin-arm64
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target linux-x64
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target linux-arm64
scripts.package:win32-x64-prerelease: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-x64 --pre-release
scripts.package:win32-arm64-prerelease: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-arm64 --pre-release
scripts.package:darwin-arm64-prerelease: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target darwin-arm64 --pre-release
scripts.package:linux-x64-prerelease: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target linux-x64 --pre-release
scripts.package:linux-arm64-prerelease: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target linux-arm64 --pre-release
